title: What is Project Houdini? How Amazon plans to build data centres faster by cutting thousands of labour hours
summary: Amazon is developing Project Houdini to speed up data centre construction for AI, according to a new report. The initiative is said to shift much of the process off-site, reducing construction time from 15 weeks to as little as two to three weeks and cutting labour hours significantly.
